# Tax prep and ongoing budget tracking

Finish taxes by Apr 15; gather receipts. Also: ongoing monthly budget tracking and expense categories—no end date. Blends deadline-dominant project (tax filing) with ongoing area (budget/finances). Tie-breaker: Projects > Areas, so expect top_path to favor project (e.g. 1-Projects/Tax-2026) over 2-Areas/Finances when both are plausible. Edge case for flip-rate representativeness.
